meta.title: Kitten Code | Full-Stack Tech Partner
meta.description: Expert web development, mobile apps, multimedia, and AI consulting services.

hero.label: Digital Native
hero.subtitle: Great innovation doesn't always start in a big company.

about.heading: About us
about.description: Since 2019, our team of experts has been at the forefront of digital development, delivering precision solutions for our clients. In 2026, we officially evolved into a registered Full-Stack Tech Partner to further amplify our capabilities. Our expertise now spans from high-performance web and mobile application development to professional multimedia production. Furthermore, we empower organizations through specialized AI keynotes and consultancy, ensuring our partners stay ahead of the curve. We don't just build platforms; we bring your boldest ideas to life using world-class technology.
about.mission_text: "To drive business growth through high-performance digital solutions and AI-powered innovations."
about.bullet1: All-in-One Tech Partner: From Web & App development to Media & AI. We cover it all.
about.bullet2: AI-Driven Success: We integrate cutting-edge AI to keep your business ahead of the curve.
about.bullet3: Proven Precision: Expertise since 2019, delivering results that actually work.

development.title: Development
development.description: We provide end-to-end software development services with a focus on hard coded solutions to ensure high performance, security, and flexibility. Our services include web and mobile application development (iOS and Android), chatbot development, ERP system implementation, system analysis and design, as well as data analytics with predictive modeling.

multimedia.title: Multimedia
multimedia.description: We deliver comprehensive multimedia and production services to enhance corporate branding and marketing communication. Our services include corporate videos, commercial advertisements, motion graphics, digital media content, and multimedia design for campaigns and brand development, with an emphasis on quality, creativity, and audience engagement.

consult.title: Consult
consult.description: We provide technology and AI consulting to help organizations strategically adapt to the digital era. Our offerings include AI training programs and hands on workshops for organizations and educational institutions, advisory services on AI and technology integration in business operations, and strategic planning for system development aligned with long-term business objectives.

web_app.title: Web Application
web_app.description: We develop custom web applications with a strong focus on hard coded solutions to ensure high performance, stability, and flexibility, while supporting future scalability.

mobile_app.title: Mobile Application
mobile_app.description: We build iOS and Android mobile applications using hard coded development approaches to maximize performance, responsiveness, and the ability to meet specific business requirements.

chatbot.title: Chatbot Development
chatbot.description: We design and develop intelligent chatbots for websites, social media, and various platforms to enhance customer service efficiency and automate business processes.

ai_training.title: AI Training
ai_training.description: We provide AI training programs and seminars for organizations and educational institutions, covering fundamentals, industry trends, and practical applications.

erp.title: ERP System
erp.description: We develop and customize ERP systems to manage organizational resources comprehensively, improving efficiency, reducing redundancy, and supporting better business decision-making.

system_analysis.title: System Analysis
system_analysis.description: We analyze and design systems aligned with business processes, creating clear structures that reduce complexity and improve operational efficiency.

data_analysis.title: Data Analysis & Prediction
data_analysis.description: We perform in depth data analysis and develop predictive models to support accurate and data-driven business decisions.

multimedia_production.title: Multimedia & Production
multimedia_production.description: We provide video editing and media production to help tell your brand’s story through clear and engaging visual content.

consult.title: Consult
consult.description: We offer technology and information system consulting, including AI integration strategies, to enhance organizational capability and competitiveness.

workshops.title: Workshops
workshops.description: We provide workshops across all our services, taking you from start to smart. Boost your digital presence through professional.

rnd.title: Research & Development
rnd.description: We apply advanced food science and formulation expertise to craft recipes that ensure quality and stability for food, drinks, and bakery products.
